evidence.summary: Bun.serve() based HTTP+WebSocket server. Entry point for Claude Code Desktop App. Handles /api/, /ws/, /sdk/, /proxy/ routes. Integrates CORS, auth middleware, H5 access policy, team watcher, cron scheduler. Graceful shutdown kills CLI subprocesses.

Central API router mapping ~25 resource endpoints (sessions, workflows, settings, models, teams, providers, mcp, plugins, computer-use, diagnostics, doctor, h5-access, memory, desktop-ui, etc.) to handler modules via switch-case on URL segments.
Session file read/write operations for CLI-persisted JSONL session data under ~/.claude/projects/. Types: SessionListItem, SessionDetail, SessionLaunchInfo. Ensures Desktop App and CLI data interop.

CLI subprocess manager. Each desktop session owns one CLI subprocess communicating over SDK WebSocket bridge. Manages spawn, permission requests, SDK messages, output callbacks. Supports file/image attachments.

Workflow session state machine. Manages phase transitions, completion submissions, artifact pointers, prompt assembly with skill provenance. Imports workflow types, template registry, phase skill resolver, tool policy.

Polls ~/.claude/teams/ directory for changes. Detects team_created/team_update/team_deleted events. Pushes real-time WebSocket updates to connected clients. Uses polling for cross-platform reliability.

Plugin lifecycle management: enable/disable/install/uninstall/update operations. Loads built-in and marketplace plugins. Manages MCP server integration, LSP server integration, hooks, and commands from plugins.
Workspace file search and session history search. Uses ripgrep (rg) with grep fallback. Types: SearchResult, SessionSearchResult. Supports glob filtering, case sensitivity, max results.
Authentication middleware using Anthropic API Key via Bearer token. Validates Authorization header against ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var. Also supports H5 token authentication.

SSE streaming transformation: OpenAI Chat Completions -> Anthropic Messages format. Handles provider-specific reasoning formats (DeepSeek, OpenAI o-series, GLM-5, etc.). Derived from cc-switch project (MIT).

Analytics event logging public API. Queue-based design with no dependencies to avoid import cycles. Events queued until attachAnalyticsSink() called. Supports sync/async logging. PII-tagged proto fields stripped before Datadog. Marker types enforce safe metadata.

Anthropic API client factory. Supports Direct API, AWS Bedrock, Azure Foundry, Vertex AI, and OpenAI Codex auth. Handles OAuth, API key resolution, custom headers, proxy options, request timeouts. ~440 lines of multi-provider client construction.

API error handling and classification. Wraps Anthropic SDK errors into user-facing messages. Handles rate limits, overage, connection errors, prompt-too-long. Types for ClaudeAI limits, overage disabled reasons.

MCP (Model Context Protocol) client. Manages connections to stdio, SSE, HTTP, WebSocket, SDK, and claudeai-proxy MCP servers. Handles OAuth auth, session expiry, tool/resource/command fetching, elicitation, cleanup. ~2400 lines. Core MCP infrastructure.

Conversation compaction engine. Summarizes older messages while preserving recent history. Supports full, partial, and auto compaction. Uses forked agent for prompt cache sharing. Post-compact restores file attachments, plan files, skills, async agent status. ~1700 lines.
Auto-compaction trigger. Monitors token count against context window. Triggers compaction when threshold exceeded. Circuit breaker for consecutive failures. Integrates with session memory compaction.
Background memory consolidation. Fires /dream prompt as forked subagent when time-gate AND session-gate pass. Uses consolidation lock, session scanning throttle. Integrates with DreamTask system.

Extracts durable memories from session transcripts to ~/.claude/projects/<path>/memory/. Runs once per query loop via stop hooks. Uses forked agent pattern sharing parent prompt cache. Manages tool permissions for extraction subagent.
Session Memory auto-maintains a markdown file with conversation notes. Runs periodically in background using forked subagent. Registers post-sampling hook. Integrates with auto-compact system.

LSP server manager singleton. Lazy initialization with state tracking (not-started/pending/success/failed). Creates LSPServerManager instance, registers notification handlers. Generation counter prevents stale promises.

Generated stub from scan-missing-imports. Placeholder for ant-internal feature() gated modules. Proxy-based noop that satisfies bun build resolver. Exports stub functions for cached MC state, protected namespace checks, coordinator context.

edges.label: server forwards /proxy/ requests to proxy handler
server starts teamWatcher, cronScheduler; conversationService for shutdown
sessionService imports workflow session metadata types
API client imports analytics for event logging
compact integrates with session memory compaction

observations.summary: The server is a Bun.serve() HTTP+WS application serving as the Claude Code Desktop App backend, with ~25 REST API endpoints, WebSocket channels (client + SDK), and an OpenAI-compatible proxy layer.

src/server/services/ contains ~30 service modules covering session management, workflow orchestration, team watching, cron scheduling, plugin lifecycle, OAuth, diagnostics, and more. The workflow subsystem alone has 14 files spanning runtime, templates, validation, and reporting.

src/services/ is the CLI-side services layer. The MCP client (~2400 lines) and compact system (~1700 lines for compact.ts alone) are the largest single modules. Memory services (autoDream, extractMemories, SessionMemory) use a forked-agent pattern for background processing.

The API client (src/services/api/client.ts) is a multi-provider factory supporting Direct Anthropic, AWS Bedrock, Azure Foundry, Google Vertex, and OpenAI Codex authentication, making it a critical dependency for all LLM interactions.

Several files are auto-generated stubs (src/server/index.ts, src/services/contextCollapse/index.ts) from scan-missing-imports, serving as placeholders for ant-internal feature() gated modules in the external build.
